tools.name: feed.retrieveNearEarthObjectFeed
tools.description: Get a list of Near Earth Objects within a date range, The max range in one query is 7 days

tools.name: feed.retrieveNeoFeedToday
tools.description: Get a list of Near Earth Objects for today

tools.name: neo.browseNearEarthObjects
tools.description: Retieve a paginated list of Near Earth Objects

tools.name: neo.retrieveNearEarthObjectById
tools.description: Retrieve a Near Earth Objects with a given id

tools.name: neosentry.retrieveSentryRiskData
tools.description: Retrieves Near Earth Objects listed in the NASA sentry data set

tools.name: neosentry.retrieveSentryRiskDataById
tools.description: Retrieves Sentry Near Earth Object by ID

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
